The '''Depot XLS''' was a [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]] [[Repair Yard]] in the [[Fondor system/Legends|Fondor system]].

==History==
At some point, the repair yard was going to have the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Fury (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Fury'']], a group of three [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Assassin-class corvettes]] called [[192]], the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] ''[[Straasa]]'', the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] [[Manticore (Strike-class)|''Manticore'']], the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Sicorro]]'', and the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[AD88]]'' arriving at the depot for repairs. Unfortunately, when the ships had lowered their shields, the Rebels sent a strike force of [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] from Rogue Squadron and Green Squadron, intending to destroy the starships at their most weakest condition. The starships had [[TIE/ad starfighter]]s from [[Avenger Squadron]], [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] from [[Talon Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Talon Squadron]] and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] from Gamma Squadron as starfighter superiority and the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Hammer (Imperial-class)|''Hammer'']] as the last form of defense.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
